constraints.ocl:
context OrderItem
inv: (self.order <> null) and (self.quantity <> null)

context Order
inv: (self.shipment <> null) and (self.status <> null)

context Store
inv: self.products->any(x | x.basePrice < 50) <> null

context Product
inv: self.variants->any(x | x.priceDelta >= 0) <> null

context Store
inv: self.coupons->any(x | x.code <> '') <> null

context DiscountRule
inv: self.percentOff >= 20 and self.percentOff <= 88

context InventoryItem
inv: self.quantity >= 73 and self.quantity <= 75

context Address
inv: (self.city <> null) and (self.customer <> null)

context SupportTicket
inv: (self.ticketNo <> null) and (self.customer <> null)

context Shipment
inv: (self.trackingNo <> null) and (self.order <> null)
